title: Reject oversize LR1110 RX packets instead of truncating
description: Trigger: LR1110 receives a payload longer than the caller-provided lora_recv() buffer. lichen/drivers/lora/lr1110/lr1110.c:363 uses MIN(rx_payload_length, size), reads only that many bytes, and returns success. Impact: upper layers receive a syntactically successful but truncated radio frame, which can be parsed as corrupted LICHEN data instead of being dropped. Match the loopback/sim driver behavior: if rx_payload_length > size, return -EMSGSIZE and avoid delivering partial frames.
close_reason: Implemented fixes in assigned subagents and ran available focused checks; full Zephyr builds remain blocked by existing workspace/module setup issues.
